# jobs.rochanegra.com

Brutal honesty for job seekers. An AI-powered skepticism engine that teardowns CVs and startup ideas using structured mental models (Fermi estimation, Pre-mortems, Inversion).

## Core Functionalities
1. **CV Analysis**: AI-powered CV analysis and optimization.
2. **Interview Prep**: AI-powered interview preparation.
3. **Job Search**: AI-powered job search assistance.
4. **Resume Builder**: AI-powered resume builder.

## Resources & Frameworks
- **Job Seeker Prep**: How to stress-test pitches, common deck mistakes, and what investors never ask aloud.

## Technical Details
- **Architecture**: Next.js (App Router), i18n support.
- **Privacy**: CV data is private and not shared with any third party except for AI analysis.

## Links
- [Landing Page](https://jobs.rochanegra.com)
- [Resources Hub](https://jobs.rochanegra.com/blog)
- [Get started](https://jobs.rochanegra.com/dashboard)
